privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic git cherry-pick exercise on an 'auth-service' Java project. The feature/v2-upgrade branch contains three commits: (1) 'WIP: Start adding OAuth2 stubs' adding a TODO comment, (2) 'FIX: Use constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks' replacing Arrays.equals with MessageDigest.isEqual while retaining the OAuth2 TODO comment, and (3) 'WIP: Add debug logging' adding a tempDebug method. The target is to cherry-pick only the FIX commit into main, resulting in AuthUtils.java containing MessageDigest.isEqual but NOT containing the WIP markers (OAuth2 TODO or tempDebug method). The verifier checks: (1) fix code present (40pts), (2) WIP code absent (30pts), (3) commit message in log (20pts), (4) compilation success (10pts), requiring 70+ points to pass.
